event: Saint Anthony Abbot Reading in a Landscape
symbols: open book — devotion to Scripture and sacred reading in solitude
rocky cave — the ascetic withdrawal from worldly life
walking staff — the pilgrim's life and the support of faith
distant church reflected in water — the Church sustained by the hermit's hidden prayer
barren landscape opening to green — the spiritual fruit that grows from desert solitude
description: A horizontal landscape composition divided between a rocky cave on the left and an expansive vista on the right. At the left, an elderly bald and bearded figure in a brown robe sits reading from an open book, with a walking staff leaning nearby. A dark animal (possibly a pig, Anthony's traditional attribute) is barely visible in the cave shadow. The right half opens to a broad landscape with a calm lake, distant hills, and a small church reflected in the water. The sky shows warm golden light breaking through clouds.

_meta.title: St. Anthony Abad at a Landscape
